scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @repo/electron run build && tsc && concurrently -k "tsc -w --preserveWatchOutput" "vite --port 5173" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 dist/main.js dist/preload.js && DESKTOP_RENDERER_URL=http://localhost:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @repo/electron run build && tsc && vite build
scripts.start: pnpm --filter @repo/electron run build && tsc && vite build && electron .
